# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Contributor Testing Workflow

on: pull_request_target

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
      - name: Post results as comment
        if: success()
        uses: actions/github-script@v3
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;
            const octokit = github.getOctokit(github.context.repo.owner, github.context.repo.repo);
            const comment = {
              body: "Test results:\n\n" + JSON.stringify(results),
              commit_id: pr.head.sha,
              path: pr.head.ref,
              position: 1,
              author: {
                name: "Continuous Integration",
                email: "ci@example.com"
              }
            };
            octokit.issues.createComment({ ...context.repo, ...comment });
